source.description: Indicates this record requires hydration from an external service. The stub record on the PDS contains minimal data; full content is fetched from the service endpoint.

vary.description: Indicates when hydration is needed. 'authenticated' means full content requires viewer authentication.

subject.description: Reference to the full record at the hydration service.

service.description: DID of the hydration service, optionally with fragment identifying the service entry (e.g., 'did:plc:abc123#atproto_pns').

subjectRef.description: A strong reference to a record, including its content hash for verification.

uri.description: AT-URI of the record at the hydration service.

cid.description: CID of the full record content for integrity verification.
